parsed_questions.question_text: What is the pKa of a sp hybridized carbon atom?
Circle the letter of the molecule with the lowest barrier to rotation (or ring-flip).
parsed_questions.context:
a) ethane
b) propane
c) butane
d) cyclohexane

parsed_questions.question_text: Rank the following substituents in order of priority (1 = highest priority).
If a chiral molecule has an absolute configuration of R, which direction does it rotate the plane of polarized light?
parsed_questions.context:
a) clockwise (dextrorotary)
b) counterclockwise (levorotatory)
c) it doesn't rotate the plane of polarized light
d) can't be determined from the information given
